text_excerpt: Community and Environmental Issues - Luke Charters MP for York Outer Skip to content Home Find Help Community and Environmental Issues Education Healthcare Parliamentary and Policy Issues Local Government and Public Services Other Matters My Work News About Contact Stay updated on social media Facebook-f X-twitter Youtube Instagram Need help with community and environmental issues? Scroll to find out about how I can help Please note that many agencies and organisations have formal complaints and appeals processes. I cannot intervene or help until these channels have been exhausted. I am unable to intervene in situations where there is an ongoing police investigation or judicial process apart from assisting constituents (where possible) to obtain legal advice and representation. No information or suggestions received from my team should be treated as formal legal or specialist advice. How I can help: Raise matters which impact York Outer on your behalf in the House of Commons. Contact relevant departments or officials on your behalf to help with enquiries or complaints. Write to Secretaries of State or Ministers regarding relevant issues once all other channels of enquiry have been exhausted. What I can't do: I cannot help in settling disputes between family members, neighbours or between yourself and an employer. I cannot involve myself in legal processes or active police investigations or contest decisions made in a court of law. Provide financial or business advice. Priority contacts These organisations can help with a range of issues. City of York Council Complaints Team Email address [email protected] Address West Offices, Station Rise, York, YO1 6GA Phone Number 01904 554145 Visit website Joseph Rowntree Housing Trust Email address [email protected] Address Feedback Team, JRHT, The Garth, White Rose Avenue, New Earswick, York, YO32 4TZ Phone Number 0800 587 0211 Visit website North Yorkshire Police Address Complaints and Recognition Team, Office of the North Yorkshire Police, Fire and Crime Commissioner, Harrogate Police Station, Beckwith Head Rd, Harrogate, HG3 1FR Phone Number 101 Visit website City of York Council Complaints Team Email address [email protected] Address West Offices, Station Rise, York, YO1 6GA Phone number 01904 554145 Visit website Joseph Rowntree Housing Trust Email address [email protected] Address Feedback Team, JRHT, The Garth, White Rose Avenue, New Earswick, York, YO32 4TZ Phone number 0800 587 0211 Visit website North Yorkshire Police Address Complaints and Recognition Team, Office of the North Yorkshire Police, Fire and Crime Commissioner, Harrogate Police Station, Beckwith Head Rd, Harrogate, HG3 1FR Phone number 101 Visit website Need to discuss your situation with me? My team are available to review your situation and see what I can do to assist your matter. Fill in this form to get in touch Description Please feel free to provide us with a copy of any relevant documentation. Upload up to 3 files, max file size 2MB.
